mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fc_java.team_board (t_num, board_num, board_id, board_title, board_content, board_file, board_readcount, board_createdate, board_lastupdate) SELECT #{t_num}, COALESCE(MAX(board_num), 0) + 1, #{board_id}, #{board_title}, #{board_content}, #{board_file}, 0, now(), now() FROM fc_java.team_board WHERE t_num = #{t_num};
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM fc_java.freeborder
title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%')
memo LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%')
id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%')
(title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%') OR memo LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%'))
ORDER BY number DESC;
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fc_java.freeborder (id, title, memo) VALUES (#{id}, #{title}, #{memo});
mapper.select: SELECT num, title, bon AS content, c_time AS createdAt, u_time AS updatedAt, user FROM fc_java.prd_board ORDER BY c_time DESC;
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fc_java.prd_board (title, bon, c_time, u_time, user) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, now(), now(), 'default_user');
mapper.select: SELECT title, u_name AS userName, content FROM fc_java.str_qa;
